commit.message:
Use hybrid crypto for PQ PKI: ML-DSA-87 signing + RSA-2048 transport

ML-DSA-87 keys cannot be used for TLS (OpenSSL/Python SSL don't support
ML-DSA for TLS handshakes yet). Use hybrid approach:
- ML-DSA-87: CA signing certs, OCSP signing certs (post-quantum security)
- RSA-2048: TLS server, subsystem, admin, audit certs (TLS compatibility)

Also fix audit_signing_signing_algorithm to ML-DSA-87 (the CA signs the
audit cert with its ML-DSA-87 key, regardless of the audit key type).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: cert-revocation-lab
repository.description: Event-driven certificate revocation lab with triple PKI hierarchies (RSA-4096, ECC P-384, ML-DSA-87). Automated Zero Trust response using Dogtag PKI, FreeIPA, Kafka, and Event-Driven Ansible.

commit.message:
chore: add server key naming convention to CLAUDE.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: register CLEU at file-load time to avoid Midnight protection

Frame:RegisterEvent("COMBAT_LOG_EVENT_UNFILTERED") is an
ADDON_ACTION_FORBIDDEN call when invoked during the PLAYER_LOGIN /
OnEnable execution context in WoW Midnight. Registering the event at
file-load time (before that restricted context) works fine, matching
the same pattern as the earlier successful UNIT_COMBAT probe. The
_enabled flag gates all processing so the always-registered frame is
a no-op until Enable() is called.

commit.message:
Feature: Support multiple function calls in single LLM response

When the model returns multiple function calls (e.g. save_scrutinio_data
+ create_incident_report in one turn), the orchestrator now processes
all of them and combines the results. Previously only the first
function call was executed, losing the second action.

Rewrite from TypeScript to Go

Complete rewrite of the Freebee Matrix bot as GogoBee using mautrix-go.

- E2EE with goolm (pure Go, no CGo/libolm) and cross-signing bootstrap
- 35+ plugins with dependency injection and ordered registration
- SQLite storage via modernc.org/sqlite (no CGo)
- Scheduler via robfig/cron for WOTD, holidays, birthdays, releases, etc.
- Optional LLM integration (Ollama) for sentiment, profanity, roasts, vibes
- Threaded trivia, three-tier profanity tracking, WOTD usage verification
- Multi-country holiday support with deduplication
- Quadratic XP curve, configurable bot display name, encrypted DMs

commit.message:
Improve Flatow Hand font: fix symbols, stroke-weight small caps, text tweaks

- Fix symbol positioning: apostrophe, quotes, and hyphen now float at
  their natural vertical position instead of sitting on the baseline
- Fix symbol column detection: double-quote no longer splits into two
  columns, which was causing comma/dash to be swapped
- Small caps now use bitmap resize + morphological dilation instead of
  outline scaling, so lowercase stroke weight matches uppercase
- Remove GSUB table to prevent Caveat contextual alternates from
  overriding custom glyphs
- Change "Built-Ins" to "Built-ins"
- Reviews use body font (Jost) instead of display font
- Bump font cache buster to v=16

commit.message:
refactor: use rolling 1-year returns for Kelly downside (long-term holder perspective)

Replace daily VaR with 10th percentile of rolling 252-day returns in
Kelly position sizer. This measures what a bad year actually looks like
instead of penalizing short-term volatility. Also removes vol/drawdown
score penalties from portfolio builder — Kelly fraction alone now drives
ranking. Adds BTC miners thesis and Polymarket probability anchoring docs.

commit.message:
week02 slide 5: add vocal fold animation sub-slide (CSS d:path)

Add Slide 5b 'Vocal Fold Movement' as a vertical sub-slide below
the static Voicing diagram. Inline SVG uses CSS @keyframes with
d:path() to animate the voiced ↔ voiceless cycle in a 6-second loop:
- Voiced phase (0–40 %): three vibration oscillations, ≈ markers visible
- Opening transition (40–55 %)
- Voiceless phase (55–75 %): folds abducted, airflow arrow visible
- Closing transition (75–90 %)
Background colour, state labels and ≈ / airflow elements all cross-fade
in sync.  No external resources required; scrollH ≤ 700 px on both slides.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Single-file mobile app prototype with 9 screens: Home, Sign In, Sign Up,
Table of Contents, Recipe, Add Recipe, Family, Profile, and Settings.
Features include editable TOC sections, recipe sharing, and family member management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Windows MSI redirect with .cmd installer

Smart App Control blocks the unsigned MSI. The .cmd installer downloads
daemon + tray exes, strips Mark-of-the-Web via Unblock-File, and runs
the daemon directly. Double-clickable from any Windows browser.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Whop webhook integration — auto-create trial client + license key on purchase

- New /api/webhooks/whop endpoint: receives Whop purchase webhooks,
  matches buyer to trial_leads by email, creates client under algofintech
  agency, generates license key with 7-day trial expiration, stores
  Whop membership ID for sync, sends custom trial onboarding email
  with license key + signup URL, sends Slack purchase notification
- New /api/webhooks/whop/test endpoint: simulates Whop purchase for testing
- Migration 9-10: adds trial_expires_at and whop_membership_id to
  software_keys, adds status column to trial_leads
- Client login now checks trial_expires_at and auto-expires keys,
  returns clear "trial expired" message

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3D T-SNE visualization script for expert activations

- matplotlib 3D plots (by expert, by layer, multi-angle)
- plotly interactive HTML (if installed)
- PCA + 3D T-SNE pipeline, GPU-accelerated collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix DOCX parsing: replace broken ZIP reader with fflate library

The custom ZIP reader used DecompressionStream("raw") which is not a
valid format (should be "deflate-raw"), causing all compressed entries
to silently fail. Replaced with fflate via esm.sh — a battle-tested
pure JS zip library that works reliably in Deno.

Fix CourseSelector flash on open

Show loading state until courses have been fetched, and only show
the spinner if the fetch takes longer than 150ms. Prevents the
jarring content swap when courses load quickly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: OMC 분석 기반 3대 강화 — Critic 독립 검증, 병렬 구현, 품질 게이트

## 새 기능
- critic.md: 독립 검증 에이전트 신규 생성 (Architect와 분리된 비판자)
- plan.md Step 5.5: Critic 독립 검증 단계 (80% 파일참조, 90% 테스트가능 기준)
  - --quick: Critic 생략 / --consensus: 최대 3회 Architect↔Critic 루프
- plan.md: 1회 1질문 원칙 (OMC best practice 적용)
- plan.md: squad-plan.json에 병렬 그룹(groups) + 의존성 그래프 스키마 추가
- build.md Phase 3: 독립 그룹 병렬 구현 (run_in_background: true)
  - 동일 파일 충돌 감지 시 순차 폴백

## 개선
- build.md Phase 0: plan-ready 상태 명시적 처리 + 메시지 분기
- analyze.md: guard-plan-mode.sh 참조 → mode: "plan" 으로 갱신

## OMC 대비 Squad 차별점
- 2000줄 경량 구조 유지하면서 OMC의 핵심 3가지(Critic/병렬/품질게이트) 흡수
- OMC에 없는 자기개선 루프(agent-effectiveness, false-positives) 유지
- 컨텍스트 효율성(1000자 요약 원칙, 세션 분리) 유지

Fix definition migration for production: safe column rename with data copy

The auto-generated migration crashed on Railway because it tried to add a
NOT NULL column without a default on a table with existing rows. Rewritten
to add nullable → copy data from trueDefinition → set NOT NULL → drop old columns.

fix: replace GetSpellCooldown with C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown for Midnight

GetSpellCooldown is nil in WoW Midnight. Switch to C_Spell.GetSpellCooldown

legacy global for older clients.

commit.message:
Add Ollama tools, streaming for Anthropic/Gemini, response-format, error handling, and test suite

- Update Anthropic default model to claude-sonnet-4-20250514
- Add max-tokens (num_predict) support for Ollama
- Make invoke-tool return error strings instead of signaling, letting LLMs recover
- Add tool calling support for Ollama (non-streaming, OpenAI tool format)
- Add response-format keyword for Anthropic (structured outputs) and Gemini (JSON mode)
- Add streaming support for Anthropic (SSE content_block_delta parsing)
- Add streaming support for Gemini (SSE streamGenerateContent endpoint)
- Add FiveAM test suite (completions/tests system) with 15 unit tests
